description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push events. The workflow has three jobs: check, test, and deploy. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, checks the package, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the check job, tests the package with multiple Python versions, and uploads coverage to Codecov. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the test job, and deploys the package to PyPI and creates a GitHub release if the push event is a tag.
